title: Reject oversized raw CoAP payload safely
description: Rust Stack::send_coap_raw can slice beyond its fixed 256-byte IPv6 buffer for payloads over the supported bound, panicking instead of returning TxError. Preflight exact capacity and add boundary tests.
notes: Completed in e1b52012a. Added subtraction-first 208-byte IPv6/UDP payload preflight before casts, indexing, compression, or tuple allocation; 209-byte regression verifies BufferTooSmall and unchanged tuple state. Validation: targeted test, all 125 node tests plus doctests, touched-file rustfmt, package-only strict Clippy, diff check, and three scoped reviews.
close_reason: Completed in e1b52012a; oversized raw CoAP now fails safely before state mutation
